title: Assistant Store Manager - Milton International Enterprises - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Milton International Enterprises - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Milton International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Milton International Enterprises:
Milton International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milton International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
